commands.command:
while next_page:
    response = requests.get(next_page_url, headers=headers)
    data = response.json()
    next_page = data.get('next_page')

import logging
logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO)
logging.info('Request: %s', data)
logging.info('Response: %s', response.json())
